questions.question: What is 'few-shot prompting'?
options: Giving the AI very little context
Providing examples of the desired input-output pattern in the prompt
Using a short prompt for speed

questions.question: Chain-of-thought prompting works best for:
options: Multi-step reasoning tasks where showing work improves accuracy

questions.question: Which model is generally best for long-form document analysis requiring nuance?
options: Claude (Sonnet or Opus) — known for large context and careful reasoning

questions.question: What is the most effective first step when building a personal AI workflow?
options: Subscribe to every AI tool available
Identify one repetitive task you do weekly and automate that first

questions.question: Why does providing context about your role improve AI output quality?
options: It makes the AI work faster
It helps the model calibrate vocabulary, depth, and format to your actual needs
